title: Forgotten Recipes – Uncraftable Items Made Craftable
description: Introduces logical, vanilla-balanced crafting recipes for previously uncraftable items.
body:
This mod adds **missing and long-requested crafting recipes** to Minecraft while staying as close as possible to vanilla balance and logic.

It introduces sensible recipes for items that were previously obtainable only through loot, trading, or rare drops, making progression smoother without breaking game balance.

### Added crafting recipes include (see gallery for components placement):

*   Saddle
*   Name Tag
*   Bell
*   Chainmail armor (helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots)
*   Horse armor (iron, gold, diamond)
*   Cobweb
*   String
*   Enchanted Golden Apple (Notch Apple)
*   Leather (alternative processing recipe)

All recipes are designed to feel **vanilla-friendly**, using existing materials and intuitive patterns, without introducing new items or mechanics.

Perfect for players who enjoy survival gameplay but want fewer artificial limitations and more crafting consistency.
